testsuite.name: SearchTests

testcase.name: successfulSearchTest()

failure.message: org.openqa.selenium.remote.NoSuchDriverException: chromedriver located at C:\Users\РљРѕР»СЏ\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\147.0.7727.56\chromedriver.exe, but invalid For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location/ Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: driver.version: SelenideDriver selenide.url: https://www.google.com/ selenide.baseUrl: http://localhost:8080
